title: Wacky Bitch Slapping Motif
wikitext:
[]: Wacky Bitch-Slapping Motif             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 12:54 pm Bitch-slapping: it happens in Eva multiple times, so it must mean something !!! Let us count the ways: - Rei expresses displeasure over Shinji's lack of respect for his father - Asuka expresses displeasure over having her undergarments glimpsed by the 14-year-old male cast (ironic for a girl who spends half the series walking around in a skintight jumpsuit) - Asuka expresses displeasure over reception of Toji's change from their brief crotchal transaction - Misato expresses displeasure over Ritsuko's cold black heart - Misato expresses displeasure over Ritsuko's lack of SCIENCE as manifested by Shinji's lack of physical manifestation inside the Eva - Asuka expresses displeasure over Rei's existence - Asuka expresses displeasure over Shinji's denial of her denial of Kaji's state of being dead - AU Asuka expresses displeasure over Shinji's penis - Someone expresses displeasure over something - it's kinda hard to tell, too much mindfuck - Not-AU Asuka attempts to express displeasure over Shinji's existence, but fails because she is HAVING THE LIFE CHOKED OUT OF HER. Truly, a symbol of mind-warpingly cryptic and unspeakably profound intent. What could it mean , guys?? Me, I think it's a symbol of the expanding role of women in postwar Japan, and anybody who doesn't see that is an uneducated bumpkin. Clearly.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Apr 25, 2011 3:36 pm Let's see where this one goes and hopefully we shan't have to drag it out behind the barn too soon. Moved to Chit-Chat because it is probably best done frivolously.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 3:59 pm What are you talking about, this is obviously a deep and meaningful symbol that is 2deep4U apparently! Okay, fine, this thread is maybe 25% sincere. Maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Apr 25, 2011 4:08 pm gatotsu911 wrote: What are you talking about, this is obviously a deep and meaningful symbol that is 2deep4U apparently! Okay, fine, this thread is maybe 25% sincere. Maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Apr 25, 2011 4:31 pm You forgot one! Ritsuko gets slapped twice! (Once in ep 16 and once in ep 20) ...And there's another "stopped" splap in Rebuild, not stopped by choking, but by an arm.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 4:34 pm Oho! I knew I was forgetting something! Do refresh my memory? (Also, anyone who wants to take a stab at addressing this topic seriously is invited to do so, hence why I originally posted it in the "Discussion" subforum.)

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Apr 25, 2011 4:39 pm gatotsu911 wrote: Oho! I knew I was forgetting something! Do refresh my memory? (Also, anyone who wants to take a stab at addressing this topic seriously is invited to do so, hence why I originally posted it in the "Discussion" subforum.)

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 4:42 pm Example has been added!! I look forward to these Technicolor® pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Apr 25, 2011 6:02 pm Xd I like the way you worded the examples XD Here it comes: Do NOT insult Gendo Ikari in MY presence: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Apr 25, 2011 7:01 pm I'm sure Jimbo or someone will be along shortly to point out how the slapping relates to the choking and how they both relate to the hand motif. There will probably be a wall of text, but I don't have the energy to type that right now, so I'll just point it out for now.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Apr 25, 2011 9:06 pm Kendrix wrote: Here it comes:

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Apr 25, 2011 11:00 pm Note that slaps are somehow still percieved as an extreme form of "conversation"/"hand gestures" and not yet as "physical assault"... Could be related to that.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 26, 2011 2:22 am Trajan wrote: I'm sure Jimbo or someone will be along shortly to point out how the slapping relates to the choking and how they both relate to the hand motif. There will probably be a wall of text, but I don't have the energy to type that right now, so I'll just point it out for now.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 26, 2011 2:09 pm This is proof for my theory, Eva was a story about Shinji learning to be a pimp! Oh, BTW, that last one wasn't a slap, she was caressing his face.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 26, 2011 2:34 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: This is proof for my theory, Eva was a story about Shinji learning to be a pimp! Oh, BTW, that last one wasn't a slap, she was caressing his face.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 26, 2011 2:39 pm Kendrix wrote: That's the very same impression I got and I don't even ship them. In fact, most here seem to agree that it definitely wasn't a slap - The movement ist to slow, she lingers on his face.... Also, he choked her BEFORE that. Unless the script says slap, I don't think it is one...

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue Apr 26, 2011 3:14 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Oh, BTW, that last one wasn't a slap, she was caressing his face.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 26, 2011 3:18 pm gatotsu911 wrote: OH RLY NAO

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Apr 26, 2011 4:57 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: You should ship them. That scene is proof in itself. That and the scene in "both of you dance like you want to win!" The late night almost kiss. Now on topic I think we should do a montage of these to the glove slap song.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 26, 2011 5:07 pm TehDonutKing wrote: 1-26 is ship neutral, 1-20 and 21'-26' is Shinji × Asuka, whereas the manga is Shinji × Rei. I think.
